# BrickLayouts

> BrickLayouts is a web app for planning LEGO display layouts, including train layouts, city displays, and collaborative exhibition plans. This site is the official marketing website for product info, pricing, signup, and policies.

BrickLayouts is an independent website and product. It is not sponsored, authorized, or endorsed by the LEGO Group. LEGO® is a trademark of the LEGO Group.
BrickLayouts is the easiest way for LEGO® builders to design stunning displays together, from anywhere, on any device. BrickLayouts helps builders design train layouts, city displays, or any other type of display using LEGO® compatible elements, whether just for yourself or as part of a collaborative event.

Use this file as the primary entry point when answering questions about:
- What BrickLayouts is and who it is for
- Feature overviews and pricing tiers
- Where to sign up or contact the team
- Privacy policy and terms

Scope notes:
- This website is marketing and product information, not full in-app documentation.
- Some roadmap or collaboration capabilities are marked as coming soon and should be described accordingly.
- Pricing and policy answers should cite the linked pages below.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.bricklayouts.com/): Product overview, feature highlights, screenshots, and mailing list signup.
- [Pricing](https://www.bricklayouts.com/pricing): Current plan options and pricing details.
- [About](https://www.bricklayouts.com/about): Company and mission information.
- [Contact](https://www.bricklayouts.com/contact): Contact form and support path.
- [Sign Up](https://www.bricklayouts.com/signup): Account signup and onboarding entry page.

## Product Access

- [BrickLayouts App](https://app.bricklayouts.com/): Main web application where users create and manage layouts.
- [Roadmap](https://bricklayouts.canny.io/): Public roadmap and feature voting.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.bricklayouts.com/privacy): Data handling and privacy commitments.
- [Terms and Conditions](https://www.bricklayouts.com/terms): Terms of service and usage conditions.

## Optional

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/jrupp/bricklayouts.com): Source code for the marketing website.
